items.label: Site description
items.value: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout warehouse-highbay example. 600 m² industrial warehouse (30×20 m); 32 × HIGHBAY at 22000 lm each on a 4×8 grid mounted at 8 m + 12 × EMERGENCY 300 lm in 3×4 grid for BS 5266-1 anti-panic compliance. Photometric-analysis verifies the 200 lux warehouse target + U₀ 0.4 + UGR 25.

value._source: Synthetic industrial highbay LED, 22000lm, 4000K, narrow-beam reflector (~50° beam) mounted at 8m per CIBSE LG12 industrial warehouse design. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.

Synthetic emergency luminaire, 300lm, 6500K cool white, wide-beam wall-pack-style for anti-panic open-area coverage per BS 5266-1:2016 §5.3. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — runtime emergency-mode flag treats this fixture separately from main calc; the main illuminance calc uses HIGHBAY only.
